headline: Founder and CEO of Payfy, building corporate spend management for Brazilian companies
title: CEO and Co-founder
confidenceNote: Payfy author page, LinkedIn, and Brazilian startup coverage consistently identify Andre Apollaro as Payfy founder/CEO and describe the company focus.
bioMarkdown: Technology entrepreneur and CEO/co-founder of Payfy, a Brazilian fintech focused on corporate expense management, cards, reimbursements, approvals, ERP integrations, and finance-team automation. Useful connection for conversations on fintech GTM in Brazil, CFO workflows, corporate spend controls, and scaling B2B financial operations.

primary.note: Company-hosted profile describes Andre as a technology entrepreneur and founder of Payfy.

headline: Director of Operations at EBANX focused on payment performance across emerging markets

headline: CTO and co-founder of Yuzu Labs, building GTM intelligence and action workflows
title: CTO
confidenceNote: Yuzu Labs' own About page names Andrew Correa as CTO and co-founder; company blog bylines and LinkedIn support the technical/operator profile.
bioMarkdown: CTO and co-founder of Yuzu Labs, an AI-native GTM action layer that turns sales conversations, emails, and deal signals into next actions. Background spans COO/CTO leadership, production software and hardware, LLM training, and peer-reviewed ML research. Useful connection for GTM AI, revenue intelligence, agent workflows, and early-stage product architecture.

primary.label: Yuzu Labs About page
primary.note: Company-hosted page identifies Andrew Correa as CTO and co-founder and summarizes his operator and technical background.

primary.label: Yuzu Labs blog author listing
primary.note: Shows multiple Yuzu posts authored by Andrew Correa in June 2026.

primary.note: Primary authored post on deal memory, forecast accuracy, and GTM intelligence.

headline: Co-founder and CEO of Elorian AI, building visual reasoning systems after Google Brain and DeepMind
title: Co-founder and CEO
confidenceNote: Elorian's official site, Andrew's LinkedIn, and investor/media coverage consistently identify him as co-founder/CEO and former Google Brain/DeepMind researcher.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and CEO of Elorian AI, a multimodal reasoning lab focused on visual reasoning. Previously spent nearly 14 years at Google, including Google Brain and DeepMind, with work tied to Gemini, PaLM 2, GLaM, and pretraining/data leadership. Strong match for discussions on foundation models, visual intelligence, multimodal reasoning, and AI research company building.

primary.label: Elorian AI official site
primary.note: Company site lists Andrew Dai as Co-Founder and CEO and describes Elorian's visual reasoning thesis.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile identifies Andrew as Co-founder at Elorian AI, ex-DeepMind, located in Palo Alto.

primary.label: LinkedIn launch post
primary.note: Andrew announces Elorian AI, describes former Google Brain/DeepMind background, and mentions $55M raised.

primary.label: X profile
primary.note: Public social profile describes Andrew as co-founder and CEO at Elorian AI and a deep learning/LLM researcher.

secondary.label: Pulse 2.0 funding coverage
secondary.note: Reports Elorian AI's $55M raise and Andrew Dai's former Google Brain and DeepMind leadership background.

secondary.label: Delta Podcast episode
secondary.note: Podcast listing describes Andrew as Elorian co-founder/CEO and former DeepMind research director.

headline: Generative AI manager at Eastman leading enterprise AI enablement and applied copilots
title: Manager, Artificial Intelligence
confidenceNote: LinkedIn, Microsoft customer story, and workforce-development report consistently identify Andrew Ervin as Eastman's generative AI manager and describe his enterprise AI work.
bioMarkdown: Manager of AI and generative AI at Eastman, focused on enterprise AI adoption, data-enabled copilots, and AI upskilling. Public case studies describe work on internal ChatGPT usage, Microsoft Fabric, Azure OpenAI, and sales-copilot workflows that reduce customer-research and reporting time. Useful connection for practical enterprise AI rollout in industrial and materials organizations.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Identifies Andrew Ervin as Manager, Generative AI at Eastman in Kingsport, Tennessee.

primary.label: Microsoft customer story
primary.note: Quotes Andrew Ervin, Manager of Generative AI at Eastman, on Fabric, sales copilots, voice-first workflows, and AI-enabled customer research.
